summary: Completed frontend-focused testing of SellerCloudX platform. Backend APIs are functional, but critical frontend issues found that match user complaints about non-working buttons in settings and AI settings sections. Main issue: ActionCard buttons have empty onClick handlers and frontend login form integration problems.

minor_bugs.issue: Validation error - expects string for weight field but receives number
minor_bugs.impact: Product creation fails with validation error

critical_bugs.issue: Empty onClick handlers - buttons have onClick: () => {} which makes them non-functional
Login form not properly submitting to backend API despite backend working correctly

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form fails to authenticate despite backend /api/auth/login working perfectly
AI settings section buttons likely have same empty onClick handler issue

ui_bugs.issue: Form submission not triggering proper API calls to working backend

passed_tests: Landing page loads and navigation works
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix ActionCard onClick handlers in settings sections - replace empty onClick: () => {} with proper functionality. Fix frontend login form integration with backend API. These issues directly match user complaints about non-working buttons in settings and AI settings sections.

success_percentage.overall: 60% (backend solid, frontend needs fixes for user-reported issues)
